_comment: Discord notification messages by shift group and day of week. Mimics the Pipeline Dream message style. Edit any message here to update what posts to Discord — no code changes needed.

shift1_weekday.monday:
🎴 Austen & Aryton are LIVE on TikTok and the rips have BEGUN! 🔥
⚡ Kick off your week right — From 12:00PM to 11:00PM PST, Calipokehouse is going CRAZY with the packs and you don't want to miss it!
👀 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@calipokehouse/live
shift1_weekday.tuesday:
🃏 Austen & Aryton are back and LIVE on TikTok! 💥
🎯 Tuesday's looking good — From 12:00PM to 11:00PM PST, the packs are flying and Calipokehouse is not slowing down!
🚀 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@calipokehouse/live
shift1_weekday.wednesday:
🔓 Austen & Aryton are LIVE on TikTok and the packs are OPEN! 🎉
🌊 We're keeping the energy going — From 12:00PM to 11:00PM PST, Calipokehouse is ripping and you need to be here!
🎮 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@calipokehouse/live
shift1_weekday.thursday:
🏆 Austen & Aryton are LIVE on TikTok and going ALL night! 😤
🔥 Don't sleep on this — From 12:00PM to 12:00AM PST, Calipokehouse is ripping deep into the night!
⚡ Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@calipokehouse/live

shift2_weekday.monday:
🌙 The night shift is HERE — Shannon & Slick are LIVE on TikTok!
💫 From 11:00PM to 10:00AM PST, Calipokehouse keeps it going while you sleep — stay up and catch the rips!
🎴 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@calipokehouse/live
shift2_weekday.tuesday:
🦉 Shannon & Slick have clocked in and are LIVE on TikTok!
✨ The night crew is pulling up — From 11:00PM to 10:00AM PST, Calipokehouse never stops and neither do the packs!

shift2_weekday.wednesday:

💥 Late night rips hit different — From 11:00PM to 10:00AM PST, Calipokehouse is keeping the energy alive!

shift1_weekend._streamers: Martin & Jack (Fri-Sun day shift, continuous stream)

shift2_weekend_overnight._encoding_note: Stored by calendar day the shift starts on (Fri 12am, Sat 12am, Sun 12am). 'friday' message = Thursday night carrying into Friday morning.
